user.title: Connect to Hermes Agent
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Hermes API server.

data_description.base_url: The Hermes API server base URL. `/v1` is added automatically if omitted.
data_description.api_key: Bearer token from API_SERVER_KEY. Required for auth and session continuity.
data_description.model: Model exposed by Hermes on `/v1/models`, usually `hermes-agent` or your profile name.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Hermes API server. Check the URL and make sure the API server is running.

abort.already_configured: This Hermes API server is already configured.

data.prefer_local: Prefer local Home Assistant handling first
data.enable_session_continuity: Preserve multi-turn context with Hermes sessions

data_description.prompt: Optional extra instructions appended to the default TTS-friendly prompt.
data_description.model: Override the Hermes model name used for requests.
data_description.prefer_local: Try Home Assistant local intent handling before sending the request to Hermes.
data_description.enable_session_continuity: Send `X-Hermes-Session-Id` so Hermes can continue the same Assist conversation.
data_description.request_timeout: Maximum total request time for Hermes streaming responses.
